title: Italian Brainrot  By Anoosh
description: his mod is inspired by Italian audio-visual memes, especially those popular on TikTok.
body:
This mod is inspired by Italian audio-visual memes, especially those popular on TikTok.

Its main focus is on combining humor, weirdness, and a touch of horror or mental chaos.

It's perfect for entertaining content and reaction-style videos, similar to what’s seen in the original video.

Requires: geckolib-forge-1.20.1
